productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Brown Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone shoes. Give your formal wear a twist of style or your semi formal wear a trend lift with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion. Product Details Square toed brown slip on shoes with a stacked heel Textured leather upper with elasticated inserts at the sides of the tongue and perforations at the toe box Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Soft and padded footbed with soft inner lining Upper adhered and stitched to the outsole Textured TPU outsole with grooves and stitched detail Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
